title: APM: Browser Attack to WAF Block Correlation
description: Summary table joining browser-side attack telemetry from SOC Application Logs with the WAF signal that flagged the same Trace ID. Hosts a count of how many traces fired both an APM detection and a WAF block, so the SOC can prove cross-tier defence-in-depth coverage.
query: 'Log Source' in ('SOC Application Logs', 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and 'Trace ID' != null | stats count as Events, distinctcount('Log Source') as DistinctTiers, distinctcount('Service Name') as Services by 'Trace ID' | where DistinctTiers > 1 | sort -Events

ask_ai_prompts: List traces where both APM and WAF observed the same attack.
Which client IP triggered the most cross-tier detections?
